# SeenBy — Cold Outreach Templates

> Lead always with the free scan. The hook is showing them their own invisibility.  
> Run the teaser scan BEFORE sending so you have a real finding to reference.  
> Personalise every message — never send generic.

---

## LinkedIn DM (Primary — Use First)

**Keep it under 5 lines. No pitch. One question.**

---

**Version A — Direct finding**

> Hi [First Name] — I ran a quick test: asked ChatGPT, Gemini, and Perplexity for the best [their category] in [their city].
>
> [Competitor name] came up 3 times. [Their brand] wasn't mentioned.
>
> I track this for a living — happy to share the full scan if useful?

---

**Version B — Question opener**

> Hi [First Name] — quick question: do you know what AI recommends when someone asks "best [their service] in [their city]"?
>
> I checked for [their brand] — the results are interesting.
>
> Worth a look?

---

**Version C — Peer reference (if you have a mutual connection or industry angle)**

> Hi [First Name] — I've been doing AI visibility scans for [their industry] businesses in Malaysia and noticed [their brand] hasn't come up yet in the results.
>
> Given what you're building, thought it'd be worth sharing. Want me to send it over?

---

**Follow-up DM (send 5 days later if no reply)**

> Hi [First Name] — just circling back on this. I did the full scan for [their brand] across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude.
>
> Happy to send the results — no strings attached.

---

## Cold Email (For Direct Outreach / After LinkedIn Connection)

**Subject line options (A/B test these):**
- "What ChatGPT says about [Brand Name]"
- "I asked AI about [Brand Name] — here's what it said"
- "[Brand Name] vs [Competitor] in ChatGPT"
- "Your AI visibility score (free)"

---

**Email Body:**

Hi [First Name],

I ran a quick test — asked ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, and Claude about [their category] in [their city].

Here's what I found for [Brand Name]:

- **ChatGPT:** Not seen by AI — [Competitor A] recommended instead
- **Perplexity:** Not seen by AI — [Competitor B] and [Competitor C] came up
- **Gemini:** Seen by AI — brief mention, not a direct recommendation
- **Claude:** Not seen by AI

More and more customers are asking AI for recommendations before they Google anything. Right now, your competitors are the answer.

I run SeenBy — we track and improve how Malaysian brands appear in AI recommendations. The full scan takes about 10 minutes to review and costs nothing to look at.

Want me to send it over?

Irfan Faris  
Founder, SeenBy  
contact@seenby.my | seenby.my

---

**Follow-Up Email Sequence**

**Day 2 — Value add (if no reply)**

Subject: One more thing from the [Brand Name] scan

Hi [First Name],

Forgot to mention — beyond the visibility gap, the scan also flagged that [Brand Name]'s website is missing the three files that tell AI crawlers who you are and what you do (llms.txt, schema markup, and an updated robots.txt).

These take about 30 minutes to implement and directly affect how AI cites brands. Happy to walk you through it.

Still keen to share the full results?

Irfan

---

**Day 5 — Short nudge**

Subject: Re: What ChatGPT says about [Brand Name]

Hi [First Name] — just a quick follow-up. Still happy to share the scan.

If the timing isn't right, no worries at all — I'll check back in a few months.

Irfan

---

**Day 10 — Breakup email**

Subject: Closing the loop

Hi [First Name],

I'll leave it here — clearly the timing isn't right, and that's completely fine.

If you ever want to know what AI is saying about [Brand Name] (or what your competitors are doing to show up in AI recommendations), feel free to reach out.

Good luck with [something specific about their business — e.g., "the new branch opening"].

Irfan

---

## Qualification Notes (What Makes a Good Lead)

Run these questions mentally before spending time on a prospect:

| Signal | Good fit | Poor fit |
|---|---|---|
| Business type | Service business, reputation matters | Pure e-commerce / commodity product |
| Market | Malaysia-focused, wants local recognition | Global brand, already massive |
| Competitor gap | Real gap exists in scan results | Already dominant in AI results |
| Buying signals | Posts about marketing, recently hired CMO | No marketing investment visible |
| Decision maker | Founder / CMO you can reach directly | Large corp with long procurement |
| Budget signal | Pays for tools, has agency relationships | Solo freelancer, micro-SME |

---
